auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back to AI Governance Platform
auth.mfaSubtitle: Enter your authentication code to continue
auth.mfaCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.registrationSuccess: You can now log in with your credentials
auth.registrationPendingApproval: Your account is pending approval. You will be notified once it's activated
auth.domainBasedRegistrationHint: Use your company email address for automatic tenant assignment
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetEmailHint: We'll send password reset instructions to this email address
auth.resetEmailSentMessage: Check your email for password reset instructions. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
auth.passwordRequirements: Must be 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
auth.passwordResetSuccessMessage: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now log in with your new password.
auth.missingResetToken: Invalid or missing reset token. Please request a new password reset link.
auth.inviteRegisterSubtitle: You've been invited to join the AI Governance Platform
auth.inviteRegistrationSuccessMessage: Your account has been created and activated. You can now log in.

admin.pendingUsersSubtitle: Review and approve user registration requests
admin.noPendingUsersMessage: All user registration requests have been processed
admin.approvalConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to approve {name} ({email})? They will be granted access to the platform.
admin.rejectionConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reject {name} ({email})? They will not be granted access to the platform.
admin.invitationsSubtitle: Manage user invitations and access requests
admin.noInvitationsMessage: No user invitations have been sent yet
admin.confirmRevokeInvitation: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation?

errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.validation: Please check your input and try again.
